summary: Plan-only PR inventory review. No GitHub mutations planned. One PR is routed to central security handling, one needs branch repair before it can be considered for merge, and three need maintainer/preflight completion before finalization.

actions.reason: Small passing PR, but merge cannot be recommended without complete mergeability, comment, bot-review, and Codex /review preflight.
Security-shaped vulnerability and information-leak language requires central OpenClaw security handling instead of Clownfish backlog finalization.
Likely useful and scoped, but finalization needs maintainer/preflight completion before any merge recommendation.
Repair the contributor branch narrowly before reconsidering merge.
Executable repair path exists for the affected PR without replacing contributor work.
Broad feature and session/message-delivery behavior require maintainer scope review before Clownfish can recommend merge or repair.

needs_human: #54758: merge preflight incomplete despite passing checks
#70046: merge preflight incomplete and respin source ref is not hydrated
#92340: broad Feishu session/message-delivery feature requires maintainer scope review

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor branch #91220 by addressing the failing check-additional-boundaries-a result while preserving the existing workspace template lint scope and AdvancedForge attribution.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(docs): repair workspace template lint boundaries
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repairs source PR #91220 by addressing the failing boundary check while keeping the workspace template lint and symlink-handling scope intact.

Credit: this continues AdvancedForge's source PR work in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/91220.

Validation plan:
- pnpm check:changed
- targeted workspace/template tests
- markdownlint over docs and workspace template markdown
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for AdvancedForge.
Keep repair commits on the contributor branch when possible because maintainer_can_modify=true.
